name: Injection Premade Module
author: Shockless
description: Readable user-plugin source reference for the built-in Injection module.

surfaces.label: Injection Commands
surfaces.summary: Run mapped chat, Navigator, room entry, user, window, and stage actions.

commands.name: injection.runSourceCommand
commands.label: Run Command
commands.description: Run a saved or edited command through mapped Shockless dev helpers instead of raw packet injection.

commands.name: injection.rawPacketSend
commands.label: Raw Packet Send
commands.description: Reserved for future packet boundaries; normal actions use mapped helpers.

commands.name: injection.mappedEditor
commands.label: Mapped Injection Editor
commands.description: Run saved mapped commands from the Injection panel.
